programme.title: Masters Of The Universe
programme.desc: The evil Skeletor (Frank Langella) is poised to conquer the universe. But fear not! He-Man (Dolph Lundgren) has declared war on Skeletor, and the battle between good and evil has come to Earth. Courtney Cox also stars in the epic, action-adventure.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Collision Course
programme.desc: Steve and Terri Irwin set out to save a crocodile, unaware that it’s swallowed a U.S. satellite beacon, and now they’re targets of the CIA! Crikey!

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: Paul Walker and Jessica Alba heat up the screen as two divers who dream of finding hidden treasure.

programme.title: Road House
programme.desc: In this homage to the great westerns, a cool-but-tough bouncer is out to clean up a seedy bar.

programme.title: Red Dawn
programme.desc: The invasion has begun! Patrick Swayze, C. Thomas Howell, Lea Thompson and Charlie Sheen wage unremitting guerilla warfare in defense of their parents, their friends, their town and their country when Communist invaders storm their hometown.

programme.title: Red Dawn (2012)
programme.desc: In this thrilling remake of the 1984 movie, Spokane, Washington, is suddenly invaded by North Korea. Now under enemy occupation, a group of teens form a ragtag resistance unit determined to reclaim their town from its captors! Chris Hemsworth stars.

programme.title: Navy Seals
programme.desc: Charlie Sheen, Michael Biehn and Bill Paxton are three of America's finest Navy commandos. Sent to rescue the crew of a U.S. aircraft carrying Stinger missiles seized by Mideast terrorists, they're thrust onto the frontline of an explosive conflict!

programme.title: Remo Williams: The Adventure Begins
programme.desc: Brace yourself for an hilarious, action-packed adventure! When an NYPD cop (Fred Ward) regains consciousness after a mugging, he has a new identity! He's Remo Williams, a recruit of a top-secret organization, and he's toppling evil at every turn!

programme.title: Harley Davidson And The Marlboro Man
programme.desc: Mickey Rourke and Don Johnson star in this four-lane genre collision of biker movie, heist thriller, buddy flick and sci-fi pic that will take you to the hardline of action and adventure! Co-starring Tom Sizemore, Chelsea Field and Vanessa Williams.

programme.title: White Lightning
programme.desc: Burt Reynolds stars as a moonshiner who wages war against corrupt police officials in this action extravaganza full of epic car chases, bone-crunching brawls and terrific acting by a stellar cast that includes Ned Beatty, Diane Ladd and Bo Hopkins.

programme.title: Gator
programme.desc: The Feds want Gator McKlusky (Burt Reynolds) to go undercover to expose local crime boss and former boyhood pal, Bama McCall. When Gator discovers Bama is involved in extortion, prostitution, and murder, the suspense builds to an explosive climax!

programme.title: The Mechanic
programme.desc: In this nail-biting action film, when an aging hitman (Charles Bronson) takes on an eager apprentice (Jan-Michael Vincent) they become an unmatchable team of killers...until the pupil's ruthlessness puts the two on a deadly collision course!

programme.title: Mr. Majestyk
programme.desc: Cinema tough guy Charles Bronson stars as Majestyk, an ex-con and Vietnam vet, whose efforts to run a farm are thwarted by narrow-minded locals and corrupt cops. But when a Mafia hitman destroys his crop, the farmer's fuse is finally blown.
